reason_for_call: Draft a reply to a message

reply_points: Good to hear from her and glad she reached out
Pair early-career engineers with small ownership areas
Use design reviews as teaching moments, not gatekeeping
Ask them to explain tradeoffs in their own words
Share real failure stories and what was learned
Encourage questions early so problems do not compound
Offer to compare notes sometime if helpful

attributes.subject: Mentoring early-career engineers
attributes.body: Hi Joseph, I hope you're doing well. I'm putting together some guidance for our newer team leads and immediately thought of you. You always had a steady hand with junior engineers. If you have a minute, I'd love to hear what approaches you've found reliable when mentoring early-career engineers.

attributes.subject: Community theater dimmer rack question
attributes.body: Joseph, when you have time, could you look over the dimmer rack notes before Thursday?

attributes.subject: April chapter breakfast reminder
attributes.body: Reminder: the April chapter breakfast is next week. Please RSVP if you plan to attend.
